[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up side view shows a young person’s head and neck against a pale sky, with red circles and arrows drawn on the image.  

Main Subject:  
A person with short dark hair is shown in left-facing profile, with their face and neck filling most of the frame. The person appears to be looking to the left; the mouth is closed and the expression is neutral. They wear a blue garment around the neck area with a lighter colored trim along the collar. Two red circles are drawn on the head and ear/side area, and a red arrow points toward the lower circular mark near the neck.  

Setting:  
The background is a light, pale sky-like area with no distinct buildings or objects visible. The lighting is even and bright, suggesting outdoor daylight.  

Visual Details:  
The camera angle is a tight side-profile framing at about head-and-shoulders level. The person’s hair is dark and closely cropped. The skin tone is light. The blue clothing shows a visible collar edge with a red or darker accent line and lighter trim. The red annotations (two circles and an arrow) overlay the person’s head and neck area.  

Visible Text:  
No important visible text detected.  

Practical Summary:  
The image shows a side profile of a person outdoors with simple sky background. Red circles and an arrow overlay the head and neck area to highlight specific spots.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
